name: LG 21HQ513D-B 21.3'' 3MP IPS Diagnostic Monitor - 1536x2048 - Integrated Front Sensor - Multi-resolution Mode - Pathology Mode - Down & Wall Lighting Modes - Auto Luminance Sensor - Daisy Chain Cable Management - 2x DisplayPort - DVI-D - 2x USB 3.0
